prompt: Create a highly detailed magical anime-style illustration of a miniature world sealed inside a round transparent glass bottle with a cork stopper. Inside the bottle, place a kneeling blonde girl in a pale blue floral dress at the center of a tiny sunlit garden; her face is covered by a plain peach square placeholder, while her hands are held near her mouth in a shy, delicate pose. The bottle contains exactly 5 main interior elements: 1 central character, 1 dense pink flower bush on the left, 1 flowering arch on the right, 1 small wooden picket fence behind the character, and 1 mossy garden path covered with tiny blossoms. The exterior scene contains exactly 5 main objects: 1 large round glass bottle, 1 cork stopper, 2 stacked antique books on the lower left, 1 ornate golden box on the lower right, and 3 loose pale flowers on the tabletop in the foreground. Use an antique wooden desk in a dim vintage study with warm golden sunlight streaming through the bottle from behind, creating glowing rays, sparkling highlights, refracted glass edges, and soft bokeh in the background. The style should be romantic fantasy anime, painterly, ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, with lush greenery, pink daisies, delicate petals, rich amber shadows, reflective glass distortion, shallow depth of field, and a dreamy preserved-terrarium atmosphere. Use a vertical 3:4 composition, centered bottle, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
